skill: Nonlinear equations in one variable and systems of equations in two variables
stem:
x − 17 = (x − b)(x − 17)

Which of the following are solutions to the given equation, where b is a constant and b > 18? I. b II. b + 1 III. 17
rationale: Choice C is correct. Rewriting: (x − 17) − (x − b)(x − 17) = 0, so (x − 17)[1 − (x − b)] = 0. This gives x = 17 or x = b + 1. So solutions are b + 1 (II) and 17 (III). I (b) is not a solution.
